text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One night, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, I hit my target. Time for a<n>break.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, City. You're still at it this late?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, Yukino. Yeah, and I still have<n>more to go.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I lost big time in class the other day.<n>Was a bit of a
wake-up call.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, so that's why you're pushing<n>yourself... I've
got a lot to learn from<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You've got it backwards, if<n>anything! I
mean, I lost.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And it doesn't matter if I push myself<n>if I end up
losing anyways, you<n>know?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: ...You think so? But, I really admire<n>your tenacity!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Win or lose, I think the way you run is<n>just swell!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Er, am I being too forward for the city<n>folk?
S-sorry!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No, it's fine. Thank you, Yukino. I feel<n>better.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to get back to it!
